update-devkit-deep-imports.description: Rewrite imports from `@nx/devkit/src/...` to `@nx/devkit` (for public symbols) or `@nx/devkit/internal` (for the rest), since deep imports are no longer reachable through the package's `exports` map.

update-23-0-0-rename-create-nodes-v2-typ.description: Rename deprecated CreateNodes `V2` type imports (CreateNodesV2, CreateNodesContextV2, CreateNodesResultV2, CreateNodesFunctionV2, NxPluginV2) from `@nx/devkit` to their canonical names.
